record.field: LiveKit is an open-source WebRTC media server that powers scalable, low-latency realtime audio, video, and data for humans and AI agents.

LiveKit is an open-source WebRTC media server that powers scalable, low-latency realtime audio, video, and data for humans and AI agents.

Built in Go on the Pion WebRTC stack, LiveKit implements a Selective Forwarding Unit (SFU) that routes each participant's media through the server instead of meshing every peer, keeping client bandwidth low even on unreliable networks. It targets developers building conferencing, live streaming, telephony, and voice/video AI applications, and pairs the media server with a broad set of client and server SDKs. Self-hosted deployments share the exact same SFU, SDKs, and APIs as the managed LiveKit Cloud, so you can move between them without changing application code.

Key features
  • Horizontally scalable SFU with Redis-based routing across one to many nodes
  • Adaptive streaming with simulcast, SVC codecs (VP9, AV1), and dynamic bitrate
  • JWT access tokens, granular room permissions, and end-to-end encryption
  • Egress (recording/streaming), Ingress (external stream pull), and SIP telephony
  • Agents framework to bridge realtime media with conversational AI pipelines
  • Client and server SDKs for JavaScript, Swift, Kotlin, Flutter, Rust, Python, Go, and more
Best for

Teams building self-hosted video conferencing, live streaming, telephony, or realtime voice/video AI agents that need full control over their media infrastructure and want to avoid vendor lock-in.

field.name: tag_ids
field.eval: [Command.set([ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_self_hosted'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_communication'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_media'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_chat'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_dev_tools'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_ai'), ref('agz_infra_suite.tag_voip')])]

record.field: services: livekit: image: livekit/livekit-server:v1.9.0 restart: unless-stopped command: --config /etc/livekit.yaml volumes: - ../files/livekit.yaml:/etc/livekit.yaml ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:7880' healthcheck: test: - CMD-SHELL - "wget -qO- http://localhost:{{ livekit_port }} || exit 1" interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 6 depends_on: redis: condition: service_healthy container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network redis: image: redis:7-alpine restart: unless-stopped command: redis-server /etc/redis.conf volumes: - ../files/redis.conf:/etc/redis.conf healthcheck: test: - CMD-SHELL - redis-cli ping || exit 1 interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 6 container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_redis' networks: - internal egress: image: livekit/egress:latest restart: unless-stopped environment: - EGRESS_CONFIG_FILE=/etc/egress.yaml volumes: - ../files/egress.yaml:/etc/egress.yaml cap_add: - CAP_SYS_ADMIN depends_on: livekit: condition: service_healthy container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_egress' networks: - internal ingress: image: livekit/ingress:latest restart: unless-stopped environment: - INGRESS_CONFIG_FILE=/etc/ingress.yaml volumes: - ../files/ingress.yaml:/etc/ingress.yaml ports: - {{ rtmp_port }}:{{ rtmp_port }} - {{ ingress_udp_port }}:{{ ingress_udp_port }}/udp depends_on: livekit: condition: service_healthy container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_ingress' networks: - internal networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true
bind 0.0.0.0 protected-mode yes port 6379 timeout 0 tcp-keepalive 300 requirepass ${redis_password}

port: ${livekit_port} bind_addresses: - "" rtc: tcp_port: ${livekit_tcp_port} udp_port: ${livekit_udp_port} use_external_ip: true enable_loopback_candidate: false redis: address: ${redis_address} username: "" password: ${redis_password} db: 0 use_tls: false sentinel_master_name: "" sentinel_username: "" sentinel_password: "" sentinel_addresses: [] cluster_addresses: [] max_redirects: null turn: enabled: true domain: ${turn_domain} tls_port: ${turn_tls_port} udp_port: ${turn_udp_port} external_tls: true ingress: rtmp_base_url: rtmp://${main_domain}:${rtmp_port}/x whip_base_url: https://${whip_domain}/w keys: ${api_key}: ${api_secret}
